title: hibbertia intermedia
intro: Hibbertia intermedia, also known as Guinea flower, is a small, shrub-like plant native to eastern Australia. It is a type of prostrate or spreading shrub that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hibbertia intermedia include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and eczema. Hibbertia intermedia can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and ointments, which are often used to support skin health and reduce inflammation.
